languages.original_text: "Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

languages.text: "Как любопытно, мы разошлись с вами на разнице между частным и общим. Я рассматривал смысл жизни как глобальное понятие в рамках социума, а вы решили идти от индивида. Но рассуждения о том как эти два понятия соотносятся — тема для отдельного обсуждения".

"Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

"Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

languages.text: «Lo más curioso es que usted y yo no estamos de acuerdo en la diferencia entre lo particular y lo general. Yo consideraba el sentido de la vida como concepto global dentro de la estructura social, mientras que usted partió desde el punto de vista del individuo. La combinación de ambos conceptos, no obstante, es un tema para debates futuros».
languages.original_text: "Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

traits.locale_text: «Lo más curioso es que usted y yo no estamos de acuerdo en la diferencia entre lo particular y lo general. Yo consideraba el sentido de la vida como concepto global dentro de la estructura social, mientras que usted partió desde el punto de vista del individuo. La combinación de ambos conceptos, no obstante, es un tema para debates futuros».

languages.text: “有趣的是，我们之间的分歧在于个体和整体。我把生命意义视为社会框架内的整体性概念，而您是从个体出发。但这两者如何相互契合，值得再单独讨论。”
languages.original_text: "Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

traits.locale_text: “有趣的是，我们之间的分歧在于个体和整体。我把生命意义视为社会框架内的整体性概念，而您是从个体出发。但这两者如何相互契合，值得再单独讨论。”

languages.text: « Étonnamment, nous ne sommes pas d'accord sur la différence qui existe entre le particulier et le général. J'envisage le sens de la vie comme un concept global au sein du tissu de notre société, là où vous pensez d'abord à l'individu. Quant à savoir comment ces deux idées se rencontrent, nous pourrons l'évoquer lors d'une prochaine discussion. »
languages.original_text: "Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

traits.locale_text: « Étonnamment, nous ne sommes pas d'accord sur la différence qui existe entre le particulier et le général. J'envisage le sens de la vie comme un concept global au sein du tissu de notre société, là où vous pensez d'abord à l'individu. Quant à savoir comment ces deux idées se rencontrent, nous pourrons l'évoquer lors d'une prochaine discussion. »

languages.text: "Seltsamerweise streiten Ihr und ich über den Unterschied zwischen dem Besonderen und dem Allgemeinen. Während ich den Sinn des Lebens als globales Konzept innerhalb einer Gesellschaft betrachte, ist für Euch das Individuum der Ausgangspunkt. Aber wie diese beiden Konzepte zusammenpassen, bedarf einer separaten Diskussion."
languages.original_text: "Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

traits.locale_text: "Seltsamerweise streiten Ihr und ich über den Unterschied zwischen dem Besonderen und dem Allgemeinen. Während ich den Sinn des Lebens als globales Konzept innerhalb einer Gesellschaft betrachte, ist für Euch das Individuum der Ausgangspunkt. Aber wie diese beiden Konzepte zusammenpassen, bedarf einer separaten Diskussion."

languages.text: 「不思議なことに、私とあなたは特殊と一般の違いについて対立している。私は人生の意味を社会という枠組みの中のグローバルな概念として考えたが、あなたは個人を出発点とした。しかし、この2つの概念がどのように結びつくかは、別の議論のテーマだ。」
languages.original_text: "Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."

traits.locale_text: 「不思議なことに、私とあなたは特殊と一般の違いについて対立している。私は人生の意味を社会という枠組みの中のグローバルな概念として考えたが、あなたは個人を出発点とした。しかし、この2つの概念がどのように結びつくかは、別の議論のテーマだ。」

languages.text: "Ne tuhaftır ki tikel ile genel arasındaki fark konusunda sizinle anlaşmazlık içindeyiz. Ben hayatın anlamını toplum çerçevesinde küresel bir kavram olarak değerlendirdim, siz ise bireyi çıkış noktası olarak aldınız. Ancak bu iki kavramın birbiriyle nasıl örtüştüğü ayrı bir tartışma konusu."
languages.original_text: "Curiously enough, you and I are at odds on the difference between the particular and the general. I considered the meaning of life as a global concept within the framework of society, while you took the individual as your starting point. But how these two concepts marry up is a topic for a separate discussion."
